hook.summary: A hand presses 'DEAL' on a video poker machine to start a round.
hook.visual_action: Close-up of a Deuces & Joker Wild machine; a hand presses the green deal button.
hook.text_overlay: DEUCES & JOKER WILD, PRESS DEAL, GOOD LUCK!

scene_flow: Close-up of a video poker machine interface with 'PRESS DEAL' flashing.
Hand presses 'DEAL' and five cards are dealt onto the screen.
Hand selects specific cards to 'HOLD' for the next draw.
Hand presses 'DEAL' again, revealing a winning hand and a $250,000 payout.
Final screen displays the game icon and a 'PLAY FOR FREE' call to action.
audience_proxy: Adults 35+ who enjoy casino-style video poker and the thrill of big wins.
